description_long: This is a large, heavily armored military tank with a long, prominent main cannon extending from a low-profile turret. The vehicle features a set of wide, rugged tracks on both sides, supported by multiple road wheels, which provide stability and traction over rough terrain. The hull and turret are covered in angular, sloped armor plating, designed to deflect incoming projectiles. Two thin radio antennas are mounted on the rear of the turret, indicating communication capabilities. The exterior is finished in a matte, dark green camouflage paint, with no visible military insignia or numbers. The tank's design emphasizes protection, firepower, and mobility, making it suitable for urban and battlefield environments.
description: A large, dark green military tank with a long cannon, sloped armor, and wide tracks. It features a low-profile turret and rugged exterior for combat operations.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide tracks, sloped frontal armor, and the long barrel of the main cannon extending forward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the length of the cannon, the arrangement of the road wheels, and the low turret profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the turret, rear armor, and the two radio antennas.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the track system, turret, and cannon from the opposite side.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large main cannon mounted on the turret; no additional weapon mounts visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped armor plating on the hull and turret; no modular or reactive panels visible.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid dark green matte paint; no distinct camouflage pattern visible.
